name: 37signals
description: Compact 37signals-inspired Rails, Hotwire, product, shaping, communication, and DHH judgment skills with source-grounded recipes.

interface.shortDescription: Rails, product, shaping, and work judgment inspired by 37signals.
interface.longDescription: A compact 37signals-inspired skill plugin covering Rails implementation/review/refactoring, Hotwire, product/interface design, Shape Up style shaping, scope discipline, communication, and DHH Rails judgment. Lower-level topics such as auth, tenancy, migrations, jobs, caching, Turbo, Stimulus, Kamal, and tests live as source-grounded recipes. Community-maintained and not an official 37signals or Basecamp plugin.
defaultPrompt: Use $37signals-rails-implement to implement this Rails feature with source-grounded recipes.
Use $37signals-product-design to simplify this interface around the epicenter.
Use $37signals-shape-up and $37signals-scope-judgment to narrow this idea before implementation.
